caption: A man wearing a distinctive tall, spiky grey wig, glasses, and a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie sits in a recording studio. He wears black headphones and remains mostly still with his arms crossed, subtly shifting his facial expression and head position. To his left, a professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned near his face. The background features a wall adorned with numerous small framed photographs and a white storage cabinet. On-screen text and logos appear in the lower portions of the scene; on the left is a logo featuring a microphone icon with the text "THE STUDIO PODCAST," and on the right, text reads "BOSS TALK 101". The overall setting is a cluttered but professional studio environment, with the man serving as the central focus throughout the sequence.
